creator: gcr@tharned.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #20)
Indeed, upgrading to nextcloudclient 3.15.0 via pkg on a system with kde5 would uninstall almost all of kde5 (see attachment). Until kde6 is ready for prime time, locking nextcloudclient at 3.14.2 is the only option for people running kde5.
